ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tools" (
  "toolno" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "pocket" INTEGER /* Pocket size of the tool */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the tool */,
  "backangle" REAL /* Angle at the back of the tool */,
  "frontangle" REAL /* Angle at the front of the tool */,
  "orientation" REAL /* Orientation of the tool (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the tool or its usage */,
  "x_offset" REAL /* X-axis offset for the tool */,
  "y_offset" REAL /* Y-axis offset for the tool */,
  "z_offset" REAL /* Z-axis offset for the tool */,
  "a_offset" REAL /* A-axis offset for the tool */,
  "b_offset" REAL /* B-axis offset for the tool */,
  "c_offset" REAL /* C-axis offset for the tool */,
  "u_offset" REAL /* U-axis offset for the tool */,
  "v_offset" REAL /* V-axis offset for the tool */,
  "w_offset" REAL /* W-axis offset for the tool */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the tool */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the tool */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the tool */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material the tool is made of */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance levels for the tool */,
  "date_purchased" TEXT /* Date the tool was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the tool was maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("toolno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tools_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES tool_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool category (e.g., cutting tools, measuring tools) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID for hierarchical categories */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "toolno" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being used */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the tool is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tool used during the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the tool */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of tool usage */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of tool usage */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of tool usage in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_toolno FOREIGN KEY ("toolno") REFERENCES tools ("toolno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_usage_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the production line */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the production line is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "toolno" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., inspection, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_maintenance_toolno FOREIGN KEY ("toolno") REFERENCES tools ("toolno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "toolno" INTEGER /* ID of the tool accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_toolno FOREIGN KEY ("toolno") REFERENCES tools ("toolno")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the supplier is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the tool is ordered */,
  "toolno" INTEGER /* ID of the tool being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tools ordered */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES tool_suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_orders_toolno FOREIGN KEY ("toolno") REFERENCES tools ("toolno")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "toolno" INTEGER /* ID of the tool in inventory */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tool currently in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the tool */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Last date the inventory was updated */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the tools in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_inventory_toolno FOREIGN KEY ("toolno") REFERENCES tools ("toolno"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tool_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES tool_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
